title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.422 - Compliance with inspection requirements
text:
387.422.  Compliance with inspection requirements. — A TNC shall not allow a TNC driver to accept trip requests through the TNC's digital network unless any motor vehicle or vehicles that a TNC driver will use to provide prearranged rides meets the inspection requirements of section 307.350.
(L. 2017 H.B. 130)
